raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Subj : Dispute of Fraudulent Charges Ref : Citi Credit Card XXXX Dear Fraud Dept.

I have been trying to report to your customer service at telephone XXXX fraudulent charges on my XXXX  Card. My attempts to do so have been unsuccessful because they say " my identity can not be verified '' because I do not have an additional phone number than the one I am speaking with them on, they can not send me a verification code by text message, or are not allowed to use email. They have offered in XXXX instances to send me a letter containing a " reference number '' but both times the letter contained no number. 
Therefore I take this opportunity to write to you, as allowed by your customer service web page, with the following information on the subject fraudulent charges ( XXXX ) : XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$46.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX XXXX {$490.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$230.00} If you need additional information please contact me using secret code number XXXX. Time is of the essence as the next statement date is XX/XX/XXXX. 


XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX ( voice or text message ) XXXX XXXX
